title: Whimscape X Theone's Eating Animation Pack
description: An unofficial add-on pack that makes Theone's Eating Animation Pack compatible with Whimscape!
body:
Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) and his resource pack [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape), which is the basis for this add-on pack.

This pack retexture the foods of the [Theone's Eating Animation Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-eating-animation-pack) resource pack to fit them to [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

This pack was previously created by [Epic_me](https://modrinth.com/user/Epic_me) called [Whimscape X Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-x-eating-animation) working only with mod [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) so I made one working with resource pack of eating animation [Theone's Eating Animation Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-eating-animation-pack)

![Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ca06ac9903cc3e8a71b8dce29beefd2e5d2bf73.png)
